title: Daily CM Standup to discuss progress and blockers
meeting_title: Daily CM Standup to discuss progress and blockers

but like, right now it's not so hot.

have each in our home.

like, there's a city to three.

we don't.

you.

before he hands over the account to us.

him.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Daily CM Standup to discuss progress, blockers, and project updates.](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Weather chat revealed stark climate differences between team members' locations (Philippines, Nigeria, South Africa)](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Project updates: Saskia progressing on Prophecy articles, Feyisayo transitioning to new clients, Jessica working on Aftershoot, Ehtisham managing multiple accounts](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [Experimental process: Daryl (director) to write initial articles for new accounts (Town, Engine) before handover](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Weather Discussion

  - [Team members from diverse locations: Philippines, Nigeria, South Africa (Cape Town, previously Durban)](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Philippines: Two seasons, extreme heat (40-50°C in summer) or floods; coldest \~25-26°C](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Nigeria: Generally hot, currently rainy season (28°C); Amartan season (dry, dusty, flu-prone)](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [South Africa: Cape Town experiencing wet, cold winter (3-10°C); Durban has warmer, dry winters (15°C)](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

### Project Updates and Assignments

  - [Ehtisham:](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
      - [Keyword and Google Analytics research for Prophecy and Aftershoot](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [Sharing 10 more topics with Prophecy (21 already shared)](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [Creating 3 new outlines for Aftershoot](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Saskia:](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [Working on Prophecy articles, halfway through 3rd, aiming for 5 this week](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [Reported Atlas issues via support ticket](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Jessica:](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Focusing on Aftershoot articles](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Town articles on hold due to new experimental process](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Feyisayo:](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
      - [Transitioning to new clients, awaiting handover call](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [Added to AIMBET internal Slack channel for context gathering](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### New Account Processes

  - [Experimental approach: Director (Daryl) writing initial articles for new accounts (Town, Engine)](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Uncertainty around timeline for full handover to CM team](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Jessica's Town article to be finalized by Daryl](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

### Communication Channels

  - [Suggestion to create a dedicated channel for the four team members](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Ehtisham recommends using existing pod channel (Depot Barrel) for team communication](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ehtisham to attend meeting regarding InVet account takeover](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [Feyisayo to review AIMBET Slack channel and attend call with David and Jacob](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Jessica to finalize and submit Aftershoot articles](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Saskia to continue working on Prophecy articles, aiming for 5 this week](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Team to use Depot Barrel channel for inter-team communication](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Await further instructions on Town and Engine account assignments](https://fathom.video/share/HwmNyp1_uf6HzKU2_gM-BhSmmF4Voibp?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)

action_items.description: Share 10 additional topics w/ Prophecy team
Finalize 2 Aftershoot articles (new one + next one), submit to Ehtisham
Review AIMBET Slack channel (recorded meetings, convos) for context pre-call
Attend AIMBET call w/ David & Jacob for project info
